design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title + niche_landing + executives + generated_at; selected architecture = workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Hero (Attention), Proof & Market Context (Interest), Workflow Media & Guide (Desire), CTA Band (Action). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk only. Hero Math Verification: max-width 1100px, clamp-based font sizing ensures 2–3 lines on desktop. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense used in workflow and comparison grids. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics, guarded if GSAP unavailable. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs black pill primary, white secondary, contrast verified against #0a0a0a ink and #f7f5ef paper.
headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A premium niche landing page for busy executives who need a real personal AI assistant that can operate computers, reuse a computer-use cache, and handle repeated executive workflows reliably. Includes a deep, role-specific field guide, structured data, and a polished Super landing visual system.
